params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a synchronous memory with a depth of 4096 addresses, each storing 8 bits. It operates on the falling edge of the clock and requires an enable signal (ena) to activate reading or writing. When ena is active and we is low, it reads data from the specified address (addr) into dout. If we is high, it writes the input data (din) to the memory at the specified address. If ena is low, dout is set to zero.
